After word.

Didn't realize until I was writing this bot but like man, I really like Amy? She's so sweet.

Also, sure, it's probably a remake bot nobody asked for, but it's my brain, and I get to whip it into writing whatever porn I want, and a good amount of said porn is this.

It actually scratches an itch/emotion when I feel nothing.

Guess I just like taboo stuff. Way worse stuff than this, but yah.

Probably gonna make a simple bot next (the knocked out healer, with Brigand/MonsterPOV) to tide you guys over if SIX messages for this bit wasn't enough.

Give me some ideas for the healer, please.

Mega, signing off.
